description: Configure this shared Chrome browser for dedicated telehealth use following the standard operating procedure at ~/Desktop/telehealth_browser_standard.txt. Organize clinical bookmarks into 'Clinical Portals', 'Patient Education', and 'Crisis Resources' folders, and remove all personal bookmarks. Selectively clear history for personal domains while retaining clinical records. Grant Camera and Microphone permissions to https://doxy.me in the browser settings. Configure a custom search engine with keyword 'dsm' pointing to 'https://www.psychiatryonline.org/action/doSearch?AllField=%s'. Disable password saving and address autofill, and update the download location to ~/Documents/Patient_Handouts. Upon completion, create ~/Desktop/setup_complete.txt containing the text 'Telehealth setup verified'.
